  "findings": [
    "Riser-rated (CMR) cable installed in a plenum space instead of plenum-rated (CMP) cable."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the non-compliant riser-rated cable from the plenum space.",
    "Replace with plenum-rated (CMP) cable to meet fire safety and code requirements."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using riser-rated (CMR) cable in a plenum space is a severe code violation. Plenum spaces are used for environmental air handling, and non-plenum cables release toxic smoke and propagate fire rapidly in these areas. NEC Article 800 strictly mandates CMP (plenum-rated) cables in plenum spaces.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 800",
    "TIA-568"
  ]
}
